notes: Batch 14 is a single hand-authored Pankow P/S (psych/sociology + sensation/perception) cloze deck, split between Cloze-8d4a6 and AACloze notetypes, and is of very high structural quality. All 257 cards passed the three checks: Q/A correspondence is clean (every cloze deletion reveals text that fits the blank or its [hint]; no empty answers and no answer==question), text is well-formed and readable with no unrendered template artifacts ('{{', '{{c1::', 'FrontSide'), and the raw fields have balanced {{cN::...}} markup plus balanced HTML (b/u/i/sub/sup/div/font) tags, with no LaTeX/MathJax present. Notably, every cloze deletion contains real text and all images live in the Extra field, so there are no image-only deletions or image-only cards to flag. The only imperfections are out-of-scope content issues (spelling typos like 'percieve'/'Austism'/'Hypocritin', informal/crude mnemonics, and one card whose author-noted mesolimbic/mesocortical mapping is self-questioned), none of which break studying.
